overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a cowboy hat walking along a forest trail beside a mountain river. The character transitions from a dirt path to rocky riverbank terrain while surrounded by dense pine forests under a partly cloudy sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt forest trail parallel to the flowing river

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt path through the forest with patches of grass
fast-flowing river with white water rapids and rocky banks
dense tall pine trees covering the hillside
dense pine trees on the rocky slope above the river
rocky outcrop and boulders along the river edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a narrow dirt trail through a dense pine forest. The mountain river flows rapidly on the right side, bordered by rocky cliffs and outcrops. The path is surrounded by lush green ferns and tall evergreen trees under a partly cloudy afternoon sky.

events.description: character steps off the dirt trail onto the rocky riverbank terrain

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating across the uneven rocky surface along the river's edge

entered.detail: large flat granite boulders forming the riverbank walking surface
weathered log lying across the rocks near the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the dirt path onto large rocky boulders along the riverbank. The river is now much closer on the right, with rapids flowing between the rocks. The terrain becomes uneven as the character walks across the stone surface, with the pine forest still visible on the left and a fallen log appearing near the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character travels from a sheltered forest trail onto the rugged, open banks of a mountain river. It begins with the character walking steadily along a narrow dirt path flanked by lush green ferns and towering evergreen trees under a partly cloudy sky. As the journey progresses, the camera tracks the character moving away from the soft trail and transitioning onto large, uneven rocky boulders. The scene then shifts closer to the water's edge, where the river transforms into rushing rapids flowing between stone outcrops and a fallen log. Finally, the terrain opens up completely as the character navigates the rocky riverbank with the dense pine forest receding to the left.
